topic: Since / For (Time Expressions with Perfect Tenses)

sections.title: Since / For (Time Expressions with Perfect Tenses) — Introduction and Formula
sections.hindiTitle: Since / For (Time Expressions with Perfect Tenses) — परिचय और फॉर्मूला
sections.explanation: Since / For (Time Expressions with Perfect Tenses) is an essential building block of English grammar. Formula: Have/Has/Had + been + V-ing/V3 + for + duration | ... + since + starting point. Rules: 'For' is used with a duration/period of time (for two years, for a week) | 'Since' is used with a starting point in time (since 2020, since Monday) | Both are commonly used with perfect and perfect continuous tenses | Common mistake: using 'from' instead of 'since'
sections.formula: Have/Has/Had + been + V-ing/V3 + for + duration | ... + since + starting point

examples.hindi: मैं दो साल से यहाँ रह रहा हूँ।
examples.english: I have been living here for two years.

examples.hindi: मैं 2020 से यहाँ रह रहा हूँ।
examples.english: I have been living here since 2020.

examples.hindi: वह तीन घंटे से पढ़ रही है।
examples.english: She has been studying for three hours.

examples.hindi: वह सुबह से पढ़ रही है।
examples.english: She has been studying since morning.

examples.hindi: हम पाँच साल से दोस्त हैं।
examples.english: We have been friends for five years.

examples.hindi: हम कॉलेज के समय से दोस्त हैं।
examples.english: We have been friends since college.

sections.title: Since / For (Time Expressions with Perfect Tenses) — Daily Life Usage
sections.hindiTitle: Since / For (Time Expressions with Perfect Tenses) — रोज़मर्रा के उपयोग
sections.explanation: Everyday sentences using Since / For (Time Expressions with Perfect Tenses) for daily conversation.
sections.formula: Have/Has/Had + been + V-ing/V3 + for + duration | ... + since + starting point

examples.hindi: उसने एक हफ्ते से यह काम नहीं किया।
examples.english: He has not done this work for a week.

examples.hindi: उसने सोमवार से यह काम नहीं किया।
examples.english: He has not done this work since Monday.

examples.hindi: मुझे दस साल से यह जानकारी है।
examples.english: I have known this for ten years.

examples.hindi: मुझे 2015 से यह जानकारी है।
examples.english: I have known this since 2015.

examples.hindi: वह दो महीने से बीमार है।
examples.english: He has been sick for two months.

examples.hindi: वह अपने जन्मदिन से बीमार है।
examples.english: He has been sick since his birthday.

sections.title: Since / For (Time Expressions with Perfect Tenses) — Office & Professional Usage
sections.hindiTitle: Since / For (Time Expressions with Perfect Tenses) — ऑफिस और पेशेवर उपयोग
sections.explanation: Practice Since / For (Time Expressions with Perfect Tenses) in professional and office contexts.
sections.formula: Have/Has/Had + been + V-ing/V3 + for + duration | ... + since + starting point

examples.hindi: वे तीन साल से इस घर में हैं।
examples.english: They have been in this house for three years.

examples.hindi: वे शादी के बाद से इस घर में हैं।
examples.english: They have been in this house since their marriage.

examples.hindi: मैं एक घंटे से इंतज़ार कर रहा हूँ।
examples.english: I have been waiting for an hour.

examples.hindi: मैं दोपहर से इंतज़ार कर रहा हूँ।
examples.english: I have been waiting since noon.

sections.title: Since / For (Time Expressions with Perfect Tenses) — Negative and Question Forms
sections.hindiTitle: Since / For (Time Expressions with Perfect Tenses) — नकारात्मक और प्रश्न रूप
sections.explanation: How to make negative sentences and questions using Since / For (Time Expressions with Perfect Tenses). Common mistakes are highlighted here.
sections.formula: Have/Has/Had + been + V-ing/V3 + for + duration | ... + since + starting point

examples.hindi: उसने चार साल से यह नौकरी की है।
examples.english: She has done this job for four years.

examples.hindi: उसने 2021 से यह नौकरी की है।
examples.english: She has done this job since 2021.

examples.hindi: हम दो हफ्ते से practice कर रहे हैं।
examples.english: We have been practicing for two weeks.

examples.hindi: हम शुरुआत से practice कर रहे हैं।
examples.english: We have been practicing since the beginning.
